narrative: Middle East escalation and retaliatory strikes on Iranian energy hubs drive a geopolitical risk premium — gold higher +0.46% near $4,733; equities +0.74%; DXY -0.18%; VIX 17.5. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence dominates G8 (spread 1.536%) as soft Canada jobs data weighs on CAD while RBNZ hike bias supports NZD. USD/JPY holds at 156.69 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists despite war-driven inflation concerns. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
